title: ferray-numpy-interop: no Polars DataFrame <-> ferray 2D array conversion
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

The most natural conversion for a 2D ferray array in the Polars ecosystem is a DataFrame (columns as Series). Currently only 1D Array -> Series is supported. Add to_dataframe(arr2d, column_names) -> DataFrame and from_dataframe(df) -> Array2<T> conversions. The DataFrame conversion should create one Series per column of the 2D array. This is the primary use case for Polars interop in data science workflows.
